{"step_by_step_thinking": "A gyrometer measures angular velocity, an androidometer measures the hardness of materials, and a resonance analyzer measures the resonant frequency of a material. However, a profilometer is specifically designed to measure surface roughness and topography. Given the context of measuring surface roughness of an orthodontic mini-screw implant, a profilometer would be the most appropriate tool.", "answer_choice": "C"}
